newsItems.title: Selective Contributions 2025 – Full ranking published for Development Session I
newsItems.context: D.D. 20 May 2026 rep. 1267. Complete rankings for development projects submitted in the first 2025 session.

newsItems.title: Call for Selective Contributions – Year 2026
newsItems.context: D.D. 15 May 2026 rep. 1238. €1M for screenwriting, €2M for development, €32.7M for production (with dedicated quotas for young authors, documentaries, animation and cultural identity projects).

newsItems.title: Tax Credit for Investment Attraction – 2026 Session Opened
newsItems.context: D.D. 19 May 2026 rep. 1244. Terms and procedures for preliminary and final applications for 2026 regarding the tax credit for attracting cinematographic and audiovisual investments to Italy.

newsItems.title: Tax Credit – Decrees on tax credit recognition and cultural eligibility (April 2026)
newsItems.context: Results of the preliminary assessment for cinematographic and TV/web production, documentaries, short films and foreign executive productions.

newsItems.title: Italy-France 2026 Co-Development and Co-Production Call
newsItems.context: Funding for Franco-Italian co-development and co-production projects (feature films and audiovisual series). €1M total allocation (€500k per session).

articles.title: Tax Credit for Cinematographic and Audiovisual Production
articles.summary: 40% (or variable rates) tax credit on eligible expenditure for Italian nationality works or co-productions. Cultural eligibility requirements, caps and procedures via the DGCOL platform.
keyPoints: Base rate up to 40% for feature films and series
Eligible costs: personnel, services, post-production in Italy
Preliminary and final applications via DGCOL platform

articles.title: Tax Credit for Attracting Foreign Investment
articles.summary: Specific incentive for foreign productions shooting in Italy or using Italian services. Attractive rates for executive production and capital attraction.
keyPoints: Credit for foreign productions meeting minimum Italian spend
Simplified procedures for Italian executive producers
Annual sessions with published deadlines in dedicated notices

articles.title: Selective Contributions for Screenwriting, Development and Production
articles.summary: Annual calls under Art. 26 of Law 220/2016. Non-repayable grants for artistically and culturally valuable projects. Separate sessions for writing, development and production.
keyPoints: Reserved quotas for young authors, documentaries, animation, cultural identity
Assessment based on artistic quality, feasibility and distribution plan

articles.title: International Co-productions and Bilateral Agreements
articles.summary: Agreements with France, Germany and other countries for co-development and co-production. Access to cross-funding and multi-nationality recognition.
keyPoints: Active Italy-France 2026 call with dedicated sessions
Points for minority and majority co-productions
Integration with Creative Europe MEDIA programmes

articles.title: Tax Credit Reform and Corrective Decrees (2025-2026)
articles.summary: Corrective and implementing decrees that redefined rates, requirements and procedures following the organic reform. Continuous monitoring of sessions and operational instructions.
keyPoints: Frequent updates on deadlines and procedures (e.g. 2026 D.D.)
